language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: All app content, AI replies, reminders, and insights will follow this language.

auth.joinJourney: Join us on your mental wellness journey
auth.firebaseConnectionErrorBody: Unable to connect to Firebase Auth. Please check your internet and configuration, then reopen the app.
auth.firebaseNotReadyBody: Authentication is not yet available. Please try again in a moment.

chat.title: AI Support Assistant
chat.subtitle: Private space for your daily check-in
chat.loadHistoryError: Could not load chat history. Please try again.
chat.sendError: Failed to send message. Please check your connection.
chat.genericResponseError: I'm having trouble responding. Please try again.

home.startChatForMood: Start an AI chat to generate your first mood insight
home.startChatToSeeInteractions: Start a chat to see your latest interactions
home.tipDescription: Take 5 deep breaths: inhale for 4 counts, hold for 4, exhale for 4.

mood.title: AI Mood Insights
mood.subtitle: Mood is detected from your AI chat messages only.
mood.emptySubtitle: Start chatting with AI to generate your mood timeline.
mood.manualDisabled: Manual mood entry is disabled. Only moods detected from AI conversations are shown.

profile.darkModeSubtitle: Calming low-light theme for night use.
profile.supportiveRemindersSubtitle: Daily check-ins and smart nudges based on your AI chat activity.
profile.confirmSignOut: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.profileUpdateSuccess: Your profile has been updated successfully.
profile.profilePhotoUpdateSuccess: Your profile picture has been updated successfully.
profile.photoPermissionText: Please allow photo library access to set a profile picture.

onboarding.talkFreelyDescription: Chat with your AI support assistant anytime you need a calm space.
onboarding.trackMoodDescription: Understand your emotions over time with AI-powered mood tracking.
onboarding.staySupportedDescription: Get helpful insights and supportive reminders tailored to your patterns.
onboarding.readyDescription: You are all set. Start your first check-in and take one gentle step forward.

dailyMessages: Quick check-in: how is your heart and mind today?
A gentle reminder to pause and check in with yourself.
inactivityMessages: We have not heard from you in a while. Want to check in?
You matter to us. Want to take a quick emotional check-in?
Whenever you are ready, we are here to listen.
missedMoodMessages: You missed your mood check-in today. Want to take one minute now?
No mood check-in yet today. A quick check-in can help you reset.
A small check-in now can make tomorrow easier. Want to do it?
positiveMessages: Great job staying consistent! Keep going.
You are building a strong habit of self-care. Keep it up.
Your consistency matters. One step at a time.

api.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
api.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
api.authFailed: AI service authentication failed. Please verify backend API key configuration.
api.timeout: Request timeout. Please check your connection and try again.
api.failed: Failed to get response from AI. Please try again.
api.insightsUnavailable: Insights endpoint is not available on backend.
api.insightsFailed: Unable to generate insights right now.

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
